results.validation_notes: The existing classification of Modular Monolith + DDD is confirmed. The deep context shows clear modular monolith structure: 20+ commerce modules in packages/modules/, each with independent domain models (DDD entities like Promotion, Campaign, Order), services, and migrations. The modules are part of a single deployment unit (no separate Dockerfiles/Kubernetes). The CQRS score (0.3) in heuristics is not supported - there's no commands/queries separation, and Pipe-and-Filter (0.3) doesn't apply - data flows through module services, not pipeline filters.
